========================================================================
GUIDE FOR SETUP FACTORY / INSTALLSHIELD
========================================================================

You can easily use Setup Factory, InstallShield, or Advanced Installer to build your setup.exe.
Use the files inside this 'dist' folder as your source.

DIRECTORIES TO INCLUDE:
------------------------------------------------------------------------

1. Desktop App (POS Terminals)
   - Source Folder: [Project Root]\dist\desktop\*
   - Destination: %AppDir%\Desktop
   - Main Executable (Shortcut): RestaurantPOS.Desktop.exe

2. Manager App (Admin PC)
   - Source Folder: [Project Root]\dist\manager\*
   - Destination: %AppDir%\Manager
   - Main Executable (Shortcut): RestaurantPOS.Manager.exe

3. Backend API (Server)
   - Source Folder: [Project Root]\dist\backend\*
   - Destination: %AppDir%\Backend
   - Main Executable: RestaurantPOS.API.exe (Run as service or background)

4. Frontend Web (Client/Admin Web)
   - Source Folder: [Project Root]\dist\frontend\*
   - Destination: %AppDir%\Frontend

------------------------------------------------------------------------
SHORTCUTS TO CREATE:
------------------------------------------------------------------------
1. "Restaurant POS System" -> Target: %AppDir%\Desktop\RestaurantPOS.Desktop.exe
2. "Restaurant Manager"    -> Target: %AppDir%\Manager\RestaurantPOS.Manager.exe

------------------------------------------------------------------------
PREREQUISITES (To check or bundle):
------------------------------------------------------------------------
- .NET 9.0 Desktop Runtime (for Desktop & Manager)
- .NET 9.0 ASP.NET Core Runtime (for Backend API)
